allowCommentsInJsonFiles.title: Allow Comments in .json files
allowCommentsInJsonFiles.description: When checked, will allow comments in `.json` files even though they’re not valid according to the official JSON specification. When unchecked, comments in `.json` files will be marked as invalid, and only files with the `.jsonc` extension will mark comments as valid and allowed. (It’s recommended to reload your window or restart Lumine after changing this setting.)
